memberdef.name: INPUT_META
memberdef.initializer: static inline \ void input_item_Set ## name (input_item_t *p_input, const char *val) \ { \ input_item_SetMeta (p_input, vlc_meta_ ## name, val); \ } \ static inline \ char *input_item_Get ## name (input_item_t *p_input) \ { \ return input_item_GetMeta (p_input, vlc_meta_ ## name); \ }

memberdef.name: input_item_NewDisc
memberdef.initializer: input_item_NewExt( psz_uri, psz_name, i_duration, ITEM_TYPE_DISC, ITEM_LOCAL )

memberdef.name: input_item_NewStream
memberdef.initializer: input_item_NewExt( psz_uri, psz_name, i_duration, ITEM_TYPE_STREAM, ITEM_NET )

memberdef.name: input_item_NewFile
memberdef.initializer: input_item_NewExt( psz_uri, psz_name, i_duration, ITEM_TYPE_FILE, i_net )

detaileddescription.para: Create a root node to hold a tree of subitems for given item
Add a new child node to this parent node that will point to this subitem.
Add an already created node to children of this parent node.
Remove a node from its parent.
Delete a node created with input_item_node_Create() and all its children.
This function allows to add an option to an existing input_item_t.

memberdef.argsstring: (input_item_t *, int i_options, const char *const *ppsz_options, unsigned i_flags)
memberdef.name: input_item_AddOptions

detaileddescription.para: This function add several options to an existing input_item_t.
This function allows adding a slave to an existing input item. The slave is owned by the input item after this call.

memberdef.argsstring: (input_item_t *p_i, const char *psz_cat, const char *psz_name, const char *psz_format,...) VLC_FORMAT(4
memberdef.name: input_item_AddInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *psz_uri, const char *psz_name, vlc_tick_t i_duration, int i_type, enum input_item_net_type i_net) VLC_USED
memberdef.name: input_item_NewExt

detaileddescription.para: This function creates a new input_item_t with the provided information.
XXX You may also use input_item_New, as they need less arguments.
This function creates a new input_item_t as a copy of another.
Holds an input item, i.e. creates a new reference.
Releases an input item, i.e. decrements its reference counter.

parameterdescription.para: need to be cleaned with vlc_readdir_helper_finish()
node that will be used to add items

detaileddescription.para: Finish adding items to the node

parameterdescription.para: if true, items of the node will be sorted.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct vlc_readdir_helper *p_rdh, const char *psz_uri, const char *psz_flatpath, const char *psz_filename, int i_type, int i_net)
memberdef.name: vlc_readdir_helper_additem

detaileddescription.para: Add a new input_item_t entry to the node of the vlc_readdir_helper struct.

parameterdescription.para: flattened path of the new item. If not NULL, this function will create an input item for each sub folders (separated by '/') of psz_flatpath (so, this will un-flatten the folder hierarchy). Either psz_flatpath or psz_filename must be valid.
file name of the new item. If NULL, the file part of path will be used as a filename. Either psz_flatpath or psz_filename must be valid.

detaileddescription.para: This file defines functions, structures and enums for input items in vlc
